records.ptx_feature: PTX ISA 6.5 minimum; CUDA 13.3 emits PTX 9.3

stages.representation: convergent register-only inline PTX for m8n8k32 signed INT4 MMA
stages.detail: The isolated m8 floor probe produced 11,127-byte compute_75 NVVM IR with SHA-256 2e7b1ba07e4a33d1e8409480ea887f824bc1e4a4a7e5d9d2eae9d96302bf5278 and 4,956-byte LTOIR with SHA-256 a5984684763bcdda15f246065a3f8de5d38e803558bd5a7303322343e1a15b33.

stages.representation: isolated dense m8 INT4 register-MMA floor kernel
stages.detail: nvJitLink produced a 3,240-byte cubin with SHA-256 ed0d8aab36380a3c8d47906de00491623462d5b4ac9ee3c77e6fc46b17c18963; cuobjdump contained all eight distinct IMMA.8832.{S4,U4}.{S4,U4}[.SAT] heads.
